post_completion_updates.update_reason: Implemented Darcy static-operator support, strong-baseline gates, literature-context reporting, readiness execution, and full-run budget.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Pivoted the third active PDEBench image-suite member from 2D diffusion-reaction to official 128x128 2D Compressible Navier-Stokes and started local data staging after the storage gate passed.
post_completion_updates.decision: 2D diffusion-reaction is deferred and must not block the active suite; the next CNS tranche remains data/schema-gated until the preferred official 128x128 CNS file is fully downloaded, checksum-verified, and inspected.
post_completion_updates.metric_requirement: CNS benchmark interpretation requires denormalized nRMSE/RMSE plus Fourier-space fRMSE low/mid/high bands; fRMSE_high is the required shock/small-scale diagnostic.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Implemented the 2D Compressible Navier-Stokes adapter and current metric contract while the official HDF5 staging continues.
post_completion_updates.decision: CNS adapter support is code/test-complete for synthetic and preflight-blocked paths; real-data schema inspection and readiness smoke remain gated on the active checksum-verified HDF5 download.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Verified the official CNS HDF5, reran suite preflight to all-ready status, and completed a capped real-data CNS readiness smoke on CUDA.
post_completion_updates.decision: CNS readiness is complete and all three PDEBench image-suite tasks are now preflight-ready, but CNS remains benchmark-incomplete until full-training Hybrid ResNet, FNO, and unet_strong rows run on the full available training split.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: User requested rerunning the CNS comparison on a non-trivial capped dataset size instead of the 2-window smoke.
post_completion_updates.decision: A larger capped readiness comparison now exists and is more informative than the original tiny smoke, but it remains non-benchmark evidence because the training set is still heavily capped.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: User requested aligning the CNS training loss with the literature-backed PDEBench baseline contract instead of the earlier local MAE pilot.
post_completion_updates.decision: The CNS runner now trains Hybrid ResNet, FNO, and U-Net with MSE, matching the official PDEBench FNO/U-Net forward baseline code; the corrected capped 10-epoch rerun supersedes the earlier MAE pilot for protocol alignment.

training_loss.name: mse
training_loss.definition: mean squared error on normalized CNS fields
training_loss.rationale: Matches the official PDEBench FNO/U-Net forward baseline training code for the compressible CFD benchmarks.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: User requested a reusable CNS-only physics-loss framework behind a generic interface, with v1 terms limited to positivity, continuity residual, and global mass.
post_completion_updates.decision: The PDEBench image-suite now has a reusable default-off physics-regularization framework with a real `2d_cfd_cns` backend. CNS metadata exposes physical spacing and boundary information, the shared CNS runner can train Hybrid/FNO/U-Net with denormalized physics terms, and an enabled bounded smoke confirmed artifacted end-to-end behavior.

post_completion_updates.decision: Reducing the capped local CNS contract from `history_len=2` to `history_len=1` did not improve `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_base` or change the four-row ranking at 10 or 40 epochs; aggregate denormalized error worsened for spectral, `hybrid_resnet_cns`, and `fno_base`, while only `unet_strong` improved and still remained last.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Completed the durable modes-32 CNS backlog item after auditing the reused 10-epoch row, accepting the tracked 40-epoch run root as authoritative, and writing the anchored 10/40-epoch compare sidecars.
post_completion_updates.decision: Raising both spectral mode knobs to 32 improved the capped 10-epoch CNS row over the shared 12/12 spectral reference, but at 40 epochs the modes-32 row only improved `fRMSE_mid/high` while regressing aggregate denormalized error and `fRMSE_low`; keep the modes-32 profile manual-only and do not promote it over the shared 12/12 spectral row.

post_completion_updates.decision: Under the fixed canonical CNS shell, non-shared spectral weights helped aggregate error at `10` epochs but lost every tracked eval metric to the shared base row at `40` epochs; the fresh shared-depth pilot favored `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_shared_blocks10` on the `512 / 64 / 64` lane, but the larger-cap `1024 / 128 / 128` confirmation restored the aggregate lead to `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_base` while `shared_blocks10` kept only a slight `fRMSE_mid/high` edge and a larger runtime cost.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Completed the durable FFNO local-convolution CNS backlog item after the tracked 40-epoch tmux run finished cleanly, the fairness-critical FFNO-close backfill was accepted, and the missing 40-epoch compare/reporting surfaces were written.
post_completion_updates.decision: Adding an explicit local convolutional branch to the repo-local FFNO-close bottleneck materially improved both aggregate error and `fRMSE_high` on the capped CNS contract, beating the local FFNO-close and capped shared-spectral local anchors at 10 and 40 epochs. Keep `ffno_bottleneck_localconv_base` as the stronger repo-local FFNO-family follow-up profile, but do not promote it into a primary bundle from capped evidence alone because the official authored FFNO 40-epoch row is still materially stronger.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Recorded the implementation-review closeout for the capped 2048-cap hybrid-spectral CNS scaling follow-up by documenting that the generated inspect proof was created after the tracked run launch, while keeping the existing scaling result and verification evidence unchanged.
post_completion_updates.decision: The shared base spectral row remains the stronger aggregate local reference as the capped CNS slice grows to 2048 trajectories. The deeper shared-blocks10 row keeps only narrower `fRMSE_mid/high` advantages and regresses on aggregate beyond 1024 trajectories, so this follow-up does not justify a default-profile promotion.

post_completion_updates.decision: The frozen `40`-epoch shared-blocks10 `1024cap` row was materially under-converged. Extending the same shell-fixed row to `80` epochs improved every tracked eval metric and now beats the frozen `1024cap`, `40`-epoch shared-base row on all reported metrics, but the evidence remains mixed-budget and capped because the base row was not rerun at `80` epochs and the fresh shared-blocks10 row still satisfies the material-improvement audit rule.
post_completion_updates.comparison_standard: Keep task, dataset file, split counts, `history_len=2`, `max_windows_per_trajectory=8`, batch size `4`, training loss `mse`, and the full shared-blocks10 shell fixed; the only allowed contract delta is the epoch budget (`40 -> 80`).

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Closed the longer-context CNS backlog item after confirming the tracked `40`-epoch history-3 run finished cleanly, emitting the missing cross-history sidecar, writing the mandatory history-4 gate decision, and synchronizing the durable CNS summaries and state.
post_completion_updates.decision: Increasing the capped local CNS temporal context from `history_len=2` to `history_len=3` helped the stronger spectral, canonical Hybrid, and FNO rows at `40` epochs, but not consistently at `10` epochs; because the spectral gate signals disagree across budgets, the optional `history_len=4` branch stays closed.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Completed the capped CNS Hybrid-spectral to FFNO parameter-space backlog item after the tracked `10`-epoch shell probes finished with `EXIT:0`, the anchored compare sidecar was written from the frozen manifest, and the promotion gate closed with no `40`-epoch follow-up.
post_completion_updates.decision: Neither `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_base_down1` nor `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_base_transpose` was competitive with `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_base` on the declared ordering keys (`relative_l2`, then `err_nRMSE`, then `fRMSE_high`), so the item closes without a `40`-epoch rerun. Keep the shared spectral anchor as the aggregate local shell reference and keep `ffno_bottleneck_localconv_base` as the stronger repo-local FFNO-family alternative from the prerequisite local-conv lane.
post_completion_updates.comparison_standard: Task, dataset file, split counts, `history_len=2`, `max_windows_per_trajectory=8`, batch size, training loss `mse`, and metric family stay fixed. Only one shell axis may change relative to `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_base`.

selected_contract.selected_history_lane: Selected history lane: `history_len=2`, `40` epochs, `512 / 64 / 64` trajectories, `max_windows_per_trajectory=8`, emitted windows `4096 / 512 / 512`
selected_contract.selected_normalization_contract: Selected normalization contract: train-only per-field normalization fit on the `512` training trajectories, reused across all history slots and target channels, with evaluation reported in denormalized target space.
selected_contract.selected_training_recipe_contract: Selected training recipe contract: keep the CNS task-local `mse` override relative to the design's generic `mae` baseline; use `Adam` with learning rate `2e-4`; use `ReduceLROnPlateau` with factor `0.5`, patience `2`, threshold `0.0`, and `min_lr=1e-5`; keep batch size `4`; keep the metric family `err_RMSE`, `err_nRMSE`, `relative_l2`, `fRMSE_low`, `fRMSE_mid`, `fRMSE_high`.

authored_ffno_cutoff.cutoff_line: Authored FFNO cutoff: include authored FFNO only from the already completed same-contract `history_len=2`, `40`-epoch row recorded in this decision; do not wait for or imply any `history_len=3` authored rerun for the current headline table.
